description: A customer wants to make a one-time donation to the utility's charitable fund that helps low-income customers pay their bills.

nodes.task_description: Provide the customer with information about the assistance program.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the purpose of the program.

nodes.task_description: Process the customer's requested donation amount via their preferred payment method.
Provide the customer with a receipt for their tax-deductible donation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a receipt to the customer's email.
